case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BUREAU OF VS EVERETTE RONALD

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $315.00 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BUREAU OF DELINQUENT REVENUE AS TO DEFENDANT EVERETTE RONALD ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-25-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 08

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BUREAU OF DELINQUENT REVENUE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EVERETTE RONALD $315.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $315.00, DEFT. WILL PAY CCSF $65.00 ON 11/25/92. AND $50.00 ON 12/16/92. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ORDER TO SET ASIDE TERMS FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BUREAU OF DELINQUENT REVENUE
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT EVERETTE RONALD
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT EVERETTE RONALD
PETITION OF JUDGMENT CREDITOR TO SET ASIDE TERMS FOR PAYMENT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BUREAU OF DELINQUENT REVENUE
